title: Gridded Servers List
description: Replaces the old server list with a custom grid layout so you can access all your servers without scrolling.
body:
# Gridded Servers

Transform your multiplayer server list from a boring vertical scroll into a sleek, customizable grid of server tiles.

## Features

### 🎨 Presets & Customization
Pick from three built-in presets — **Vanilla**, **Showcase**, or **Clean** — or build your own. Adjust columns, icon size, tile padding, corner radius, and tile colors to get exactly the layout you want.

### ⭐ Favorites
Star servers to pin them to your **title screen** for one-click access without ever opening the server list.

### 🔀 Drag & Drop Reordering
Rearrange your servers by dragging tiles around the grid.

### 📋 Info Panel
Click or hover a server to open a side panel showing its MOTD, ping, player count, version, and online players — all without leaving the list.

### 🏷️ Name Display Modes
Three options for how server names appear:
- **On tile** — overlaid at the bottom with a gradient
- **Below tile** — centered underneath
- **Hidden** — icons only for a minimal look

### 🎮 Quick Access
- Double-click any tile to connect instantly
- **Server List** button in the pause menu so you can switch servers without disconnecting first

### 🖌️ Per-Server Customization
Set custom accent colors and icons for individual servers to make them stand out in the grid.
